reason: The tests require exact code patterns (SCOPE_EXIT with specific for-loop structure, exact comment text 'Ensure all already-scheduled tasks are drained.*exit path.*exception') but the no_solution_leakage rubric forbids stating these specifics. An instruction cannot pass both rubrics simultaneously - behavior_in_task_description requires recoverable literals the tests assert on, but no_solution_leakage forbids stating exact fix details. This is a test design issue: the tests verify text patterns rather than behavior.
